div.p: c row2 = _mm_loadu_ps(m + 8) row3 = _mm_loadu_ps(m + 12) tmp2 = _mm_unpacklo_ps(row2, row3) tmp3 = _mm_unpackhi_ps(row2, row3)
c col0 = _mm_unpacklo_ps(tmp0, tmp2) col1 = _mm_unpackhi_ps(tmp0, tmp2) col2 = _mm_unpacklo_ps(tmp1, tmp3) col3 = _mm_unpackhi_ps(tmp1, tmp3)

_mm_unpacklo_ps(a, b): Interleaves lower halves → [a0, b0, a1, b1]
_mm_unpackhi_ps(a, b): Interleaves upper halves → [a2, b2, a3, b3] Memory layout change: Row index i*4+j becomes column index j*4+i
